title: calea orbiculata
intro: Calea orbiculata, also known as Mexican Damiana or Calea, is a perennial plant native to Mexico and Central America, belonging to the family Asteraceae. Traditionally, this plant has been used for its medicinal properties, particularly in the treatment of anxiety and stress-related disorders. The health benefits of Calea orbiculata include its potential to act as a sedative, reduce inflammation, and improve sleep quality, making it a popular herbal remedy for promoting relaxation and calmness. Calea orbiculata is often prepared as a tea, infusion, or tincture, and can also be consumed as a capsule or supplement, although its effectiveness and safety for human consumption have not been extensively scientifically proven.
